title: oloptum thomasii
intro: Oloptum thomasii, also known as Indian spikenard or Valeriana thomasii, is a type of flowering plant native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Oloptum thomasii include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Oloptum thomasii typically include roots, leaves, and flowers, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
